commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1154262872b1f27cd171ef74e06861299ba0a416)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds source-wide memory embedding batching across files for opted-in runtimes, extends generic and memory embedding runtime types, opts built-in providers into the new flag, and adds OpenAI-compatible batch endpoint support plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +541, Tests +381. Total +922 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main indexes dirty memory files by mapping each file to indexFile, and indexFile submits batch embedding for that file's chunks. The linked user report also includes verbose output showing repeated per-file batch submissions.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author and maintainer handling because the branch is dirty against current main, has a concrete launch/build import-boundary blocker, and expands the provider runtime API contract.

target.title: perf(memory): batch memory embeddings across files
target.author: mushuiyu886
